lessons.title: Introduction to Exploitation 💥
lessons.description: Understand what exploitation means and the types of exploits.

lessons.title: Metasploit Framework Basics 🛠️
lessons.description: Learn the architecture and essential commands of the world's most popular exploitation framework.

lessons.title: Exploiting with Metasploit: Step-by-Step 🎯
lessons.description: Walk through a real exploit against Metasploitable using the vsftpd backdoor.

lessons.title: Payloads: Singles, Stagers, and Stages 💣
lessons.description: Deep dive into the code that runs after exploitation: Meterpreter, shells, and more.

lessons.title: Manual Exploitation Techniques 🔧
lessons.description: When Metasploit fails: compiling and running standalone exploits.

lessons.title: Password Attacks: Brute Force & Spraying 🔑
lessons.description: Gain access by guessing or cracking credentials for SSH, FTP, and web logins.

lessons.title: Client-Side Exploitation 🖥️
lessons.description: Trick users into running malicious code via documents or browser exploits.

lessons.title: Exploitation Best Practices & Evasion 🥷
lessons.description: Stay stealthy and avoid crashing services during exploitation.
